ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited (BBTCL) has completed the cessation of operations and full handover of its Singampatti tea estate, including settling all worker dues under a VRS. A material financial risk has emerged from a Supreme Court order noting "unrecovered" lease rentals of Rs. 4,655 crore, based on a Central Empowered Committee report, which BBTCL asserts is an unauthorized calculation outside the appeal's scope. The company vehemently disputes this figure and has filed an Interlocutory Application to recall/expunge these observations, citing prior Madras High Court orders that quashed a much smaller demand for re-quantification.
